name: Finnan Haddie (and Smoked Fish Source)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Milk or Half and Half
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin the haddock and cut into serving-sized or bite-sized pieces.
2. Melt butter in a heavy frying pan.
3. Add fish and sprinkle with pepper. Cover tightly and cook gently for about five minutes.
4. Mix a little milk into the cornstarch until smooth, then add the remaining milk. Pour this mixture over the fish.
5. Simmer gently for another five minutes.
6. Serve immediately with boiled potatoes. Serves 4 to 6, depending on the size of the fish and appetite.
Smoked haddock source:
